channel_news.title: The next era of Pride Month marketing
channel_news.summary: This week, the Modern Retail Podcast features a conversation on Pride Month marketing with LGBTQ+ marketing experts Matt Tumminello and Matt Wagner about how expectations for campaigns have shifted. They argue that "Pride marketing" is actually in its third act as cultural winds change.
